# ============================================================================
# DukanX — Serverless Framework Configuration
# ============================================================================
# Multi-Tenant SaaS Backend for 14 Business Types
# Fully Serverless: Lambda + DynamoDB + API Gateway + Cognito + S3
# Cost at zero traffic: $0.00/mo
# ============================================================================

service: my-backend

frameworkVersion: '4'

# ============================================================================
# PROVIDER
# ============================================================================
provider:
  name: aws
  runtime: nodejs24.x
  architecture: arm64       # PERF-8 FIX: Graviton3 — ~30% faster cold start, ~20% cheaper
  stage: ${opt:stage, 'dev'}
  region: ${opt:region, 'ap-south-1'}
  memorySize: 256          # 256MB — default for non-critical paths
  timeout: 10              # 10s — plenty for API calls
  logRetentionInDays: 7    # COST-OPT: 7 days sufficient for dev (was 14)
  # COST-OPT: X-Ray tracing disabled globally to save $1-5/mo
  # Re-enable per-function on critical paths (e.g. payment handlers) when needed
  tracing:
    apiGateway: false
    lambda: false
  logs:
    httpApi:
      format: '{"requestId":"$context.requestId","ip":"$context.identity.sourceIp","method":"$context.httpMethod","path":"$context.path","status":"$context.status","latency":"$context.responseLatency","userAgent":"$context.identity.userAgent"}'
  deploymentBucket:
    name: dukanx-deploys-${self:provider.region}-${aws:accountId}

  # ── API Gateway (HTTP API — cheaper than REST API) ──────────────────────
  httpApi:
    # ── JWT Authorizer (Cognito — blocks unauthenticated requests before Lambda) ──
    authorizers:
      cognitoAuthorizer:
        type: jwt
        identitySource: $request.header.Authorization
        issuerUrl: !Sub 'https://cognito-idp.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/${CognitoUserPool}'
        audience:
          - !Ref CognitoUserPoolClient
          - !Ref DesktopAppClient
          - !Ref MobileAppClient
          - !Ref AdminPanelClient
    cors:
      # HIGH-005 FIX: No wildcard defaults — fail-closed CORS policy
      allowedOrigins:
        - ${env:CORS_ORIGIN_1, 'https://admin.dukanx.com'}
        - ${env:CORS_ORIGIN_2, 'https://app.dukanx.com'}
      allowedMethods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
        - OPTIONS
      allowedHeaders:
        - Content-Type
        - Authorization
        - X-Correlation-Id
        - X-Device-Id
        - X-Request-Signature
        - X-Request-Timestamp
        - X-Nonce
        - x-tenant-id
        - x-business-id
        - x-shop-id
        - X-Idempotency-Key


  # ── Environment Variables ───────────────────────────────────────────────
  environment:
    NODE_ENV: ${self:provider.stage}
    DYNAMODB_TABLE: !Ref DukanXTable
    COGNITO_USER_POOL_ID: !Ref CognitoUserPool
    COGNITO_CLIENT_ID: !Ref CognitoUserPoolClient
    COGNITO_DESKTOP_CLIENT_ID: !Ref DesktopAppClient
    COGNITO_MOBILE_CLIENT_ID: !Ref MobileAppClient
    COGNITO_ADMIN_CLIENT_ID: !Ref AdminPanelClient
    # COGNITO_IDENTITY_POOL_ID set after IAM stack deploy (see cf-iam-roles.yml)
    COGNITO_REGION: ${self:provider.region}
    S3_BUCKET_NAME: !Ref TenantStorageBucket
    S3_REGION: ${self:provider.region}
    PLATFORM_APPLICATION_ARN: !Sub 'arn:aws:sns:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:app/GCM/DukanX-Customer-App'
    SECURITY_ALERT_TOPIC_ARN: !Ref SecurityAlertTopic
    # FIX (H-2): Internal service-to-service auth secret. MUST be set in
    # deployment environment or the Lambda will fail-fast on cold start.
    # Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32
    INTERNAL_API_SECRET: ${env:INTERNAL_API_SECRET}
    # Public RESTO PWA compat (/api/v1/restaurant/*) — off unless explicitly enabled
    RESTO_V1_PUBLIC_ENABLED: ${env:RESTO_V1_PUBLIC_ENABLED, 'false'}
    RESTO_V1_ORDER_SECRET: ${env:RESTO_V1_ORDER_SECRET, ''}  # legacy, deprecated
    # P0-02: HS256 secret for table-scoped scan JWTs. Generate: openssl rand -hex 32
    RESTO_SCAN_JWT_SECRET: ${env:RESTO_SCAN_JWT_SECRET, ''}
    # ── WebSocket Real-Time (cross-stack reference to dukanx-websocket stack) ──
    WEBSOCKET_CONNECTIONS_TABLE: dukanx-ws-connections-${self:provider.stage}
    WEBSOCKET_API_ENDPOINT: ${env:WEBSOCKET_API_ENDPOINT, ''}

    # ── AI Configurations ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
    DUKANX_AI_DEFAULT_PROVIDER: ${env:DUKANX_AI_DEFAULT_PROVIDER, 'ollama'}
    DUKANX_AI_API_KEY: ${env:DUKANX_AI_API_KEY, ''}

    # ── Smart Inventory Import ───────────────────────────────────────────────
    IMPORT_QUEUE_URL: !Ref ImportRowQueue
    ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: ${env:ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, ''}
    FUZZY_THRESHOLD: ${env:FUZZY_THRESHOLD, '0.85'}

  # ── IAM Permissions ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  iam:
    role:
      statements:

        # DynamoDB — Main table + GSIs (Single Table Design)
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - dynamodb:GetItem
            - dynamodb:PutItem
            - dynamodb:UpdateItem
            - dynamodb:DeleteItem
            - dynamodb:Query
            - dynamodb:Scan
            - dynamodb:BatchWriteItem
            - dynamodb:BatchGetItem
            - dynamodb:TransactWriteItems   # Already used by handlers
            - dynamodb:TransactGetItems     # PERF-19 FIX: Missing permission
          Resource:
            - !GetAtt DukanXTable.Arn
            - !Sub '${DukanXTable.Arn}/index/*'


        # S3 — Tenant storage (invoices, images, reports)
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - s3:GetObject
            - s3:PutObject
            - s3:DeleteObject
          Resource:
            - !Join ['', ['arn:aws:s3:::', !Ref TenantStorageBucket, '/*']]
        # Cognito — User management
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - cognito-idp:AdminGetUser
            - cognito-idp:AdminUpdateUserAttributes
          Resource:
            - !GetAtt CognitoUserPool.Arn
        # SNS — Push Notifications + Security Alerts
        # FIX (L-3): Scoped from Resource: '*' to exact topic/endpoint ARNs.
        # Prevents publishing to arbitrary topics in the account.
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - sns:CreatePlatformEndpoint
            - sns:DeleteEndpoint
          Resource:
            - !Sub 'arn:aws:sns:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:app/GCM/DukanX-Customer-App'
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - sns:Publish
          Resource:
            - !Ref SecurityAlertTopic
            - !Sub 'arn:aws:sns:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:app/GCM/DukanX-Customer-App'
            - !Sub 'arn:aws:sns:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:endpoint/GCM/DukanX-Customer-App/*'


        # S3 — Bucket-level listing (IAM-7 FIX: prefix-scoped to tenant paths only)
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - s3:ListBucket
          Resource:
            - !GetAtt TenantStorageBucket.Arn
          Condition:
            StringLike:
              s3:prefix:
                - 'tenants/${!cognito-identity.amazonaws.com:sub}/*'
                - 'tenants/*'  # Fallback — handler-level tenantId check still enforced

        # DynamoDB — WebSocket connections (cross-stack: dukanx-websocket)
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - dynamodb:PutItem
            - dynamodb:GetItem
            - dynamodb:DeleteItem
            - dynamodb:Query
            - dynamodb:Scan
          Resource:
            - !Sub 'arn:aws:dynamodb:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:table/dukanx-ws-connections-${self:provider.stage}'
            - !Sub 'arn:aws:dynamodb:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:table/dukanx-ws-connections-${self:provider.stage}/index/*'

        # API Gateway Management — WebSocket (cross-stack: dukanx-websocket)
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - execute-api:ManageConnections
          Resource:
            - !Sub 'arn:aws:execute-api:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:*/${self:provider.stage}/POST/@connections/*'

        # SQS — Async DLQ (dead letter queue for failed scheduled/async Lambdas)
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - sqs:SendMessage
          Resource:
            - !GetAtt AsyncDLQ.Arn

        # SQS — Smart Import Row Queue (FIFO)
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - sqs:SendMessage
            - sqs:SendMessageBatch
            - sqs:ReceiveMessage
            - sqs:DeleteMessage
            - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
          Resource:
            - !GetAtt ImportRowQueue.Arn
            - !GetAtt ImportRowDLQ.Arn

        # Textract — OCR for scanned import files
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - textract:AnalyzeDocument
            - textract:DetectDocumentText
          Resource: '*'
            
        # X-Ray — Distributed Tracing
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - xray:PutTraceSegments
            - xray:PutTelemetryRecords
          Resource: "*"

        # Secrets Manager - Automated Rotation
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - secretsmanager:PutSecretValue
            - secretsmanager:GetSecretValue
          Resource:
            - !Sub 'arn:aws:secretsmanager:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:secret:DukanXInternalAPISecret-*'
            - !Sub 'arn:aws:secretsmanager:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:secret:dukanx/${self:provider.stage}/tenant/*/qr-secret*'
            - !Sub 'arn:aws:secretsmanager:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:secret:dukanx/${self:provider.stage}/tenant/*/razorpay*'

        # COST-OPT: OpenSearch IAM permissions removed (domain disabled)
        # Re-enable when OpenSearch Serverless is provisioned
        # - Effect: Allow
        #   Action:
        #     - es:ESHttpGet
        #     - es:ESHttpPut
        #     - es:ESHttpPost
        #     - es:ESHttpDelete
        #     - es:ESHttpHead
        #     - es:ESHttpPatch
        #   Resource:
        #     - !Sub 'arn:aws:es:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:domain/dukanx-search-${self:provider.stage}/*'

        # COST-OPT: Search DLQ IAM permissions removed (domain disabled)
        # - Effect: Allow
        #   Action:
        #     - sqs:SendMessage
        #     - sqs:ReceiveMessage
        #     - sqs:DeleteMessage
        #     - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
        #   Resource:
        #     - !GetAtt SearchDLQ.Arn
        #     - !GetAtt SearchDLQDeadLetter.Arn

# ── Package Configuration ────────────────────────────────────────────────
# PERF-7 FIX: Individual packaging — each Lambda gets only its dependencies.
# Reduces cold start by excluding irrelevant handlers from each function's bundle.
package:
  individually: true
  patterns:
    - 'dist/**'
    - 'node_modules/**'
    - '!src/**'
    - '!tests/**'
    - '!.env*'
    - '!tsconfig.json'
    - '!*.md'
    - '!*.log'
    - '!*.txt'

# ── Custom Configuration ────────────────────────────────────────────────
custom:
  splitStacks:
    nestedStackCount: 3
    perFunction: false
    perType: true
    perGroupFunction: false

# ============================================================================
# FUNCTIONS (Lambda Handlers)
# ============================================================================
functions:

  # ── Health Checks (No Auth Required) ──────────────────────────────────
  # LOW FIX: Health check endpoints for Flutter connectivity monitoring
  health:
    handler: dist/handlers/health.health
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /health
          method: GET
          authorizer:
            name: none
    description: System health status for Flutter connectivity checks

  healthReady:
    handler: dist/handlers/health.ready
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /health/ready
          method: GET
          authorizer:
            name: none
    description: Kubernetes-style readiness probe

  healthLive:
    handler: dist/handlers/health.live
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /health/live
          method: GET
          authorizer:
            name: none
    description: Kubernetes-style liveness probe

  # ── Hybrid Migration (Offline → Online) ──────────────────────────────────
  migrationIdentity:
    handler: dist/handlers/migration.migrateIdentity
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /migration/identity
          method: POST
    description: Provision Cognito identity record for migrating offline user

  migrationImport:
    handler: dist/handlers/migration.migrationImport
    timeout: 30
    memorySize: 512
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /migration/import
          method: POST
    description: Batch-write offline records into DynamoDB (max 25/request)

  migrationUpload:
    handler: dist/handlers/migration.migrationUpload
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /migration/upload
          method: POST
    description: Return S3 presigned PUT URL for offline blob upload

  migrationVerify:
    handler: dist/handlers/migration.migrationVerify
    timeout: 30
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /migration/verify
          method: POST
    description: Verify record counts match offline audit report

  migrationCutover:
    handler: dist/handlers/migration.migrationCutover
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /migration/cutover
          method: POST
    description: Convert offline license + mark migration complete (point of no return)

  migrationRollback:
    handler: dist/handlers/migration.migrationRollback
    timeout: 60
    memorySize: 512
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /migration/rollback
          method: POST
    description: Purge all cloud data from a failed migration run (safe rollback)

  # ── Authentication ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  # AUDIT FIX #11: Validate custom:role against UserRole enum before token generation
  cognitoPreTokenGen:
    handler: dist/handlers/cognito-triggers.preTokenGeneration
    events:
      - cognitoUserPool:
          pool: CognitoUserPool
          trigger: PreTokenGeneration
    description: Validate role attribute in JWT token claims

  authSignup:
    handler: dist/handlers/auth.signup
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /auth/signup
          method: POST
          authorizer:
            name: none
      - httpApi:
          path: /owner/register
          method: POST
          authorizer:
            name: none
    description: Register new tenant + owner account

  authLogin:
    handler: dist/handlers/auth.login
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /auth/login
          method: POST
          authorizer:
            name: none
    description: Authenticate user, return Cognito tokens

  authRefresh:
    handler: dist/handlers/auth.refresh
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /auth/refresh
          method: POST
          authorizer:
            name: none
    description: Refresh expired access tokens

  authMe:
    handler: dist/handlers/auth.me
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /auth/me
          method: GET
      - httpApi:
          path: /owner/profile
          method: GET
      - httpApi:
          path: /staff/profile
          method: GET
    description: Validate token and return user with permissions

  authMfaVerify:
    handler: dist/handlers/auth.mfaVerify
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /auth/mfa/verify
          method: POST
          authorizer:
            name: none
    description: Respond to MFA challenge with TOTP code

  authMfaSetup:
    handler: dist/handlers/auth.mfaSetup
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /auth/mfa/setup
          method: POST
          authorizer:
            name: none
    description: Get setup code for Authenticator App

  authMfaSetupConfirm:
    handler: dist/handlers/auth.mfaSetupConfirm
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /auth/mfa/confirm-setup
          method: POST
          authorizer:
            name: none
    description: Verify first-time MFA setup code

  # SECURITY FIX S-1: Logout — Revokes all refresh tokens via globalSignOut
  authLogout:
    handler: dist/handlers/auth.logout
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /auth/logout

  #         type: dynamodb
  #         arn:
  #           Fn::GetAtt:
  #             - DukanXTable
  #             - StreamArn
  #         filterPatterns:
  #           - eventName: [INSERT, MODIFY, REMOVE]
  #         startingPosition: LATEST
  #         maximumRetryAttempts: 3
  #         destinationConfig:
  #           onFailure:
  #             destination: !GetAtt SearchDLQ.Arn
  #   description: Sync DynamoDB changes to OpenSearch for real-time search


# ============================================================================
# RESOURCES (CloudFormation)
# ============================================================================
resources:
  Resources:

    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    # DYNAMODB TABLE — Single Table Design
    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    DukanXTable:
      Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
      DeletionPolicy: Retain
      Properties:
        TableName: DukanX-${self:provider.stage}
        BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
        # H-7: Prevent accidental table deletion
        DeletionProtectionEnabled: true
        # H-7: Enable Point-in-Time Recovery for disaster recovery
        PointInTimeRecoverySpecification:
          PointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
        AttributeDefinitions:
          - AttributeName: PK
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: SK
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: GSI1PK
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: GSI1SK
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: GSI2PK
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: GSI2SK
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: GSI3PK
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: GSI3SK
            AttributeType: S
          # M-1: Time-based GSI for efficient date-range queries
          - AttributeName: GSI4PK
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: GSI4SK
            AttributeType: S
          # M-5: Low-stock alerts GSI for inventory management
          - AttributeName: GSI5PK
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: GSI5SK
            AttributeType: S
        KeySchema:
          - AttributeName: PK
            KeyType: HASH
          - AttributeName: SK
            KeyType: RANGE
        GlobalSecondaryIndexes:
          - IndexName: GSI1
            KeySchema:
              - AttributeName: GSI1PK
                KeyType: HASH
              - AttributeName: GSI1SK
                KeyType: RANGE
            Projection:
              ProjectionType: ALL
          - IndexName: GSI2
            KeySchema:
              - AttributeName: GSI2PK
                KeyType: HASH
              - AttributeName: GSI2SK
                KeyType: RANGE
            Projection:
              ProjectionType: ALL
          - IndexName: GSI3
            KeySchema:
              - AttributeName: GSI3PK
                KeyType: HASH
              - AttributeName: GSI3SK
                KeyType: RANGE
            Projection:
              ProjectionType: ALL
          # M-1: Time-Based GSI — enables efficient date-range queries
          # Usage: GSI4PK = TENANT#{tenantId}#INVOICE, GSI4SK = createdAt ISO string
          # Enables: Sales reports, GSTR-1, dashboard queries without full partition scans
          - IndexName: GSI4
            KeySchema:
              - AttributeName: GSI4PK
                KeyType: HASH
              - AttributeName: GSI4SK
                KeyType: RANGE
            Projection:
              ProjectionType: ALL
          # M-5: Low-Stock Alerts GSI — enables efficient low-stock queries
          # Usage: GSI5PK = TENANT#{tenantId}#LOWSTOCK, GSI5SK = PRODUCT#{id}#{quantity}
          # Enables: Dashboard alerts, periodic batch processing without full table scans
          - IndexName: GSI5
            KeySchema:
              - AttributeName: GSI5PK
                KeyType: HASH
              - AttributeName: GSI5SK
                KeyType: RANGE
            Projection:
              ProjectionType: ALL
        TimeToLiveSpecification:
          AttributeName: TTL
          Enabled: true
        # Re-enabled for DynamoDB search indexer stream processing
        StreamSpecification:
          StreamViewType: NEW_AND_OLD_IMAGES
        Tags:
          - Key: service
            Value: dukanx
          - Key: environment
            Value: ${self:provider.stage}



    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    # COGNITO USER POOL
    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    CognitoUserPool:
      Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPool
      DeletionPolicy: Retain
      Properties:
        UserPoolName: bizmate-users-${self:provider.stage}
        AutoVerifiedAttributes:
          - email
        UsernameAttributes:
          - email
        MfaConfiguration: OPTIONAL
        EnabledMfas:
          - SOFTWARE_TOKEN_MFA
        AccountRecoverySetting:
          RecoveryMechanisms:
            - Name: verified_email
              Priority: 1
        Policies:
          PasswordPolicy:
            MinimumLength: 8
            RequireLowercase: true
            RequireNumbers: true
            RequireSymbols: true            # AUDIT FIX #19: Strengthen password policy
            RequireUppercase: true
            TemporaryPasswordValidityDays: 7
        Schema:
          - Name: email
            AttributeDataType: String
            Mutable: true
            Required: true
          - Name: phone_number
            AttributeDataType: String
            Mutable: true
            Required: false
          # ── Custom Attributes for Multi-Tenancy ──
          - Name: tenant_id
            AttributeDataType: String
            Mutable: true
          - Name: role
            AttributeDataType: String
            Mutable: true
            # Values: owner, admin, manager, accountant, cashier, staff, customer
          - Name: business_type
            AttributeDataType: String
            Mutable: true
          - Name: license_status
            AttributeDataType: String
            Mutable: true
            # Values: active, expired, suspended, trial
          - Name: plan
            AttributeDataType: String
            Mutable: true
            # Values: basic, premium, enterprise
          - Name: firebase_uid
            AttributeDataType: String
            Mutable: true
            # Preserves original Firebase UID for migration mapping
        UserPoolAddOns:
          AdvancedSecurityMode: AUDIT       # AUDIT FIX #12: Free risk-score logging for credential stuffing detection
        EmailConfiguration:
          EmailSendingAccount: COGNITO_DEFAULT

    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    # USER GROUPS — Role-Based Access Control
    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    GroupSuperAdmin:
      Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPoolGroup
      Properties:
        GroupName: SuperAdmin
        UserPoolId: !Ref CognitoUserPool
        Description: Platform super-administrators (you)
        Precedence: 0

    GroupBusinessOwner:
      Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPoolGroup
      Properties:
        GroupName: BusinessOwner
        UserPoolId: !Ref CognitoUserPool
        Description: Business owners who manage their own tenant
        Precedence: 10

    GroupStaff:
      Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPoolGroup
      Properties:
        GroupName: Staff
        UserPoolId: !Ref CognitoUserPool
        Description: Staff members (manager, cashier, accountant, etc.)
        Precedence: 20

    GroupAdmin:
      Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPoolGroup
      Properties:
        GroupName: Admin
        UserPoolId: !Ref CognitoUserPool
        Description: Full access administrators
        Precedence: 21

    GroupCA:
      Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPoolGroup
      Properties:
        GroupName: CA
        UserPoolId: !Ref CognitoUserPool
        Description: Chartered accountants
        Precedence: 22

    GroupManager:
      Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPoolGroup
      Properties:
        GroupName: Manager
        UserPoolId: !Ref CognitoUserPool
        Description: Manager role with staff oversight
        Precedence: 23

    GroupCustomer:
      Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPoolGroup
      Properties:
        GroupName: Customer
        UserPoolId: !Ref CognitoUserPool
        Description: End customers using the Customer Dashboard app
        Precedence: 30

    GroupViewer:
      Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPoolGroup
      Properties:
        GroupName: Viewer
        UserPoolId: !Ref CognitoUserPool
        Description: Read-only viewer access for auditing
        Precedence: 40

    GroupCharteredAccountant:
      Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPoolGroup
      Properties:
        GroupName: CharteredAccountant
        UserPoolId: !Ref CognitoUserPool
        Description: Financial-only access for accountants/CAs
        Precedence: 50

    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    # APP CLIENTS — Separate per platform
    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

    # Desktop App Client (Electron/Flutter — public client, no secret)
    DesktopAppClient:
      Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPoolClient
      Properties:
        ClientName: bizmate-desktop-${self:provider.stage}
        UserPoolId: !Ref CognitoUserPool
        GenerateSecret: false
        ExplicitAuthFlows:
          - ALLOW_USER_PASSWORD_AUTH
          - ALLOW_REFRESH_TOKEN_AUTH
          - ALLOW_USER_SRP_AUTH
        PreventUserExistenceErrors: ENABLED
        TokenValidityUnits:
          AccessToken: hours
          IdToken: hours
          RefreshToken: days
        AccessTokenValidity: 1          # 1 hour
        IdTokenValidity: 1              # 1 hour
        RefreshTokenValidity: 90        # 90 days (desktop needs longer offline)
        ReadAttributes:
          - email
          - phone_number
          - custom:tenant_id
          - custom:role
          - custom:business_type
          - custom:license_status
          - custom:plan
          - custom:firebase_uid
        WriteAttributes:
          - email
          - phone_number

    # Mobile App Client (React Native / Flutter — public client, no secret)
    MobileAppClient:
      Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPoolClient
      Properties:
        ClientName: bizmate-mobile-${self:provider.stage}
        UserPoolId: !Ref CognitoUserPool
        GenerateSecret: false
        ExplicitAuthFlows:
          - ALLOW_USER_PASSWORD_AUTH
          - ALLOW_REFRESH_TOKEN_AUTH
          - ALLOW_USER_SRP_AUTH
        PreventUserExistenceErrors: ENABLED
        TokenValidityUnits:
          AccessToken: hours
          IdToken: hours
          RefreshToken: days
        AccessTokenValidity: 1          # 1 hour
        IdTokenValidity: 1              # 1 hour
        RefreshTokenValidity: 30        # 30 days
        ReadAttributes:
          - email
          - phone_number
          - custom:tenant_id
          - custom:role
          - custom:business_type
          - custom:license_status
          - custom:plan
          - custom:firebase_uid
        WriteAttributes:
          - email
          - phone_number

    # Admin Panel Client (Next.js web — confidential client with secret)
    AdminPanelClient:
      Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPoolClient
      Properties:
        ClientName: bizmate-admin-${self:provider.stage}
        UserPoolId: !Ref CognitoUserPool
        GenerateSecret: true
        ExplicitAuthFlows:
          - ALLOW_USER_PASSWORD_AUTH
          - ALLOW_REFRESH_TOKEN_AUTH
          - ALLOW_USER_SRP_AUTH
        PreventUserExistenceErrors: ENABLED
        TokenValidityUnits:
          AccessToken: minutes
          IdToken: minutes
          RefreshToken: days
        AccessTokenValidity: 30         # 30 minutes (tighter for admin)
        IdTokenValidity: 30             # 30 minutes
        RefreshTokenValidity: 7         # 7 days
        ReadAttributes:
          - email
          - phone_number
          - custom:tenant_id
          - custom:role
          - custom:business_type
          - custom:license_status
          - custom:plan
          - custom:firebase_uid
        WriteAttributes:
          - email

    # Legacy combined client (kept for backward compat during migration)
    CognitoUserPoolClient:
      Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPoolClient
      Properties:
        ClientName: bizmate-app-${self:provider.stage}
        UserPoolId: !Ref CognitoUserPool
        GenerateSecret: false
        ExplicitAuthFlows:
          - ALLOW_USER_PASSWORD_AUTH
          - ALLOW_REFRESH_TOKEN_AUTH
          - ALLOW_USER_SRP_AUTH
        TokenValidityUnits:
          AccessToken: hours
          IdToken: hours
          RefreshToken: days
        AccessTokenValidity: 1
        IdTokenValidity: 1
        RefreshTokenValidity: 30
        ReadAttributes:
          - email
          - custom:tenant_id
          - custom:role
          - custom:business_type
          - custom:plan
        WriteAttributes:
          - email

    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    # COGNITO IDENTITY POOL + IAM ROLES
    # Moved to cf-iam-roles.yml (deployed separately via aws cloudformation)
    # Reason: SLS v4 cannot resolve ${cognito-identity.amazonaws.com:sub}
    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    # CognitoIdentityPool:
    #   See cf-iam-roles.yml for Identity Pool + IAM roles

    # IdentityPoolRoleAttachment:
    #   See cf-iam-roles.yml

    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    # S3 BUCKET (Tenant Storage)
    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    TenantStorageBucket:
      Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
      Properties:
        BucketName: bizmate-storage-${self:provider.stage}-${aws:accountId}
        CorsConfiguration:
          CorsRules:
            - AllowedHeaders: ['Content-Type', 'Authorization', 'x-tenant-id']
              AllowedMethods: [GET, PUT]
              AllowedOrigins:
                # AUDIT FIX #3/#16: No wildcard fallback — must set env vars in production
                - ${env:CORS_ORIGIN_1, 'https://admin.dukanx.com'}
                - ${env:CORS_ORIGIN_2, 'https://app.dukanx.com'}
              MaxAge: 3600
        PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
          BlockPublicAcls: true
          BlockPublicPolicy: true
          IgnorePublicAcls: true
          RestrictPublicBuckets: true
        BucketEncryption:
          ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
            - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
                SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
                KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref PaymentKMSKey
              BucketKeyEnabled: true
        LoggingConfiguration:
          DestinationBucketName: !Ref S3AccessLogBucket
          LogFilePrefix: s3-access-logs/
        LifecycleConfiguration:
          Rules:
            - Id: ArchiveOldReports
              Prefix: tenants/
              Status: Enabled
              Transitions:
                - StorageClass: GLACIER
                  TransitionInDays: 90

    # S3 Access Log Bucket
    S3AccessLogBucket:
      Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
      Properties:
        BucketName: bizmate-access-logs-${self:provider.stage}-${aws:accountId}
        PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
          BlockPublicAcls: true
          BlockPublicPolicy: true
          IgnorePublicAcls: true
          RestrictPublicBuckets: true
        LifecycleConfiguration:
          Rules:
            - Id: ExpireOldLogs
              Status: Enabled
              ExpirationInDays: 90

    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    # KMS KEY (Payment Credential Encryption)
    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    PaymentKMSKey:
      Type: AWS::KMS::Key
      Properties:
        Description: DukanX Payment Gateway Credential Encryption Key
        Enabled: true
        EnableKeyRotation: true
        KeyPolicy:
          Version: '2012-10-17'
          Statement:
            # IAM-4 FIX: Scoped from kms:* to enumerated admin actions
            - Sid: AllowKeyAdministration
              Effect: Allow
              Principal:
                AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
              Action:
                - kms:Create*
                - kms:Describe*
                - kms:Enable*
                - kms:List*
                - kms:Put*
                - kms:Update*
                - kms:Revoke*
                - kms:Disable*
                - kms:Get*
                - kms:Delete*
                - kms:TagResource
                - kms:UntagResource
                - kms:ScheduleKeyDeletion
                - kms:CancelKeyDeletion
              Resource: '*'
            # IAM-4 FIX: Lambda usage — encrypt/decrypt only (no admin ops)
            - Sid: AllowLambdaUsage
              Effect: Allow
              Principal:
                AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
              Action:
                - kms:Encrypt
                - kms:Decrypt
                - kms:ReEncrypt*
                - kms:GenerateDataKey*
                - kms:DescribeKey
              Resource: '*'
              Condition:
                StringEquals:
                  kms:ViaService: !Sub 's3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
        Tags:
          - Key: service
            Value: dukanx-payments
          - Key: environment
            Value: ${self:provider.stage}

    PaymentKMSKeyAlias:
      Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
      Properties:
        AliasName: !Sub 'alias/dukanx-payment-key-${self:provider.stage}'
        TargetKeyId: !Ref PaymentKMSKey

    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    # AWS WAF — REMOVED
    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    # WAF removed to save ~$5-15/mo. Protection is now provided by:
    # - API Gateway built-in throttling (100 req/s, 200 burst)
    # - Cognito JWT verification (in handler-wrapper)
    # - Zod input validation schemas
    # - CloudWatch anomaly detection alarms
    # SQL injection protection is irrelevant with DynamoDB.
    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    # SNS — Security Alerts
    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    SecurityAlertTopic:
      Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
      Properties:
        TopicName: dukanx-security-alerts-${self:provider.stage}

    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    # SQS — Dead Letter Queue for Async/Scheduled Lambda Failures
    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    AsyncDLQ:
      Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
      Properties:
        QueueName: dukanx-async-dlq-${self:provider.stage}
        MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600  # 14 days
        VisibilityTimeout: 300

    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    # SQS — Search DLQ — DISABLED (COST-OPT: OpenSearch removed)
    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    # SearchDLQ:
    #   Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    #   Properties:
    #     QueueName: dukanx-search-dlq-${self:provider.stage}
    #     MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
    #     VisibilityTimeout: 60
    #     RedrivePolicy:
    #       deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt SearchDLQDeadLetter.Arn
    #       maxReceiveCount: 3

    # SearchDLQDeadLetter:
    #   Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    #   Properties:
    #     QueueName: dukanx-search-dlq-dl-${self:provider.stage}
    #     MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600

    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    # SQS — Smart Inventory Import Row Queue (FIFO for tenant ordering)
    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    ImportRowDLQ:
      Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
      Properties:
        QueueName: dukanx-import-row-dlq-${self:provider.stage}.fifo
        FifoQueue: true
        MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600  # 14 days
        VisibilityTimeout: 120
        ContentBasedDeduplication: false

    ImportRowQueue:
      Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
      Properties:
        QueueName: dukanx-import-row-queue-${self:provider.stage}.fifo
        FifoQueue: true
        ContentBasedDeduplication: false
        VisibilityTimeout: 120
        MessageRetentionPeriod: 86400  # 24 hours (import jobs are processed quickly)
        RedrivePolicy:
          deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt ImportRowDLQ.Arn
          maxReceiveCount: 3

    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    # OPENSEARCH — DISABLED (COST-OPT: saves $27-35/mo)
    # t3.small.search runs 24/7. Re-enable with OpenSearch Serverless
    # (pay-per-query) when >500 tenants need full-text search.
    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    # OpenSearchDomain:
    #   Type: AWS::OpenSearchService::Domain
    #   Properties:
    #     DomainName: dukanx-search-${self:provider.stage}
    #     EngineVersion: OpenSearch_2.11
    #     ClusterConfig:
    #       InstanceType: t3.small.search
    #       InstanceCount: 1
    #       ZoneAwarenessEnabled: false
    #     EBSOptions:
    #       EBSEnabled: true
    #       VolumeType: gp3
    #       VolumeSize: 10
    #       Iops: 3000
    #     EncryptionAtRestOptions:
    #       Enabled: true
    #     NodeToNodeEncryptionOptions:
    #       Enabled: true
    #     DomainEndpointOptions:
    #       EnforceHTTPS: true
    #       TLSSecurityPolicy: Policy-Min-TLS-1-2-2019-07

    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    # IDENTITY PROVIDERS (Google & Apple) — Commented out until real credentials are provided
    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    # ENTERPRISE SSO (Placeholder removed to prevent AWS Validation Errors)
    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    # REDIS CACHE (ElastiCache Serverless) — REMOVED FOR COST/VPC LIMITATIONS
    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    # EVENTBRIDGE (EDA)
    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    DukanXEventBus:
      Type: AWS::Events::EventBus
      Properties:
        Name: dukanx-events-${self:provider.stage}

    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    # CLOUDFRONT CDN LAYER — REMOVED TO SAVE $1-5/mo
    # Re-enable when traffic justifies CDN caching.
    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    # ApiCloudFrontDistribution:
    #   Type: AWS::CloudFront::Distribution
    #   Properties:
    #     DistributionConfig:
    #       Enabled: true
    #       HttpVersion: http2
    #       Origins:
    #         - Id: ApiGatewayOrigin
    #           DomainName: !Select [2, !Split ["/", !GetAtt HttpApi.ApiEndpoint]]
    #           CustomOriginConfig:
    #             OriginProtocolPolicy: https-only
    #             OriginSSLProtocols:
    #               - TLSv1.2
    #       DefaultCacheBehavior:
    #         TargetOriginId: ApiGatewayOrigin
    #         ViewerProtocolPolicy: redirect-to-https
    #         AllowedMethods: [GET, HEAD, OPTIONS, PUT, POST, PATCH, DELETE]
    #         CachedMethods: [GET, HEAD, OPTIONS]
    #         ForwardedValues:
    #           QueryString: true
    #           Headers:
    #             - Authorization
    #             - x-tenant-id
    #             - x-business-id



  # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  # OUTPUTS
  # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  Outputs:
    CognitoUserPoolId:
      Value: !Ref CognitoUserPool
      Description: Cognito User Pool ID

    CognitoUserPoolArn:
      Value: !GetAtt CognitoUserPool.Arn
      Description: Cognito User Pool ARN

    # Legacy client (backward compat)
    CognitoUserPoolClientId:
      Value: !Ref CognitoUserPoolClient
      Description: Legacy Cognito App Client ID

    # Per-platform clients
    DesktopAppClientId:
      Value: !Ref DesktopAppClient
      Description: Desktop App Cognito Client ID

    MobileAppClientId:
      Value: !Ref MobileAppClient
      Description: Mobile App Cognito Client ID

    AdminPanelClientId:
      Value: !Ref AdminPanelClient
      Description: Admin Panel Cognito Client ID

    # IdentityPoolId: deployed separately via cf-iam-roles.yml

    S3BucketName:
      Value: !Ref TenantStorageBucket
      Description: Tenant storage bucket name

    DynamoDBTableName:
      Value: !Ref DukanXTable
      Description: DynamoDB single-table name

    # COST-OPT: OpenSearch disabled — outputs commented out
    # OpenSearchEndpoint:
    #   Value: !GetAtt OpenSearchDomain.DomainEndpoint
    #   Description: OpenSearch domain endpoint for search service

    # SearchDLQUrl:
    #   Value: !Ref SearchDLQ
    #   Description: Search Indexer Dead Letter Queue URL

    DynamoDBTableArn:
      Value: !GetAtt DukanXTable.Arn
      Description: DynamoDB table ARN

    ApiEndpoint:
      Value: !GetAtt HttpApi.ApiEndpoint
      Description: HTTP API Gateway endpoint URL



# ============================================================================
# PLUGINS
# ============================================================================
plugins:
  - serverless-offline       # Local development
  - serverless-plugin-split-stacks
